title: Mobs & Stuff
description: A resouce pack that remakes the mob textures of Actions & Stuff and brings them to Minecraft: Java Edition
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ecf39d553c1808db90985bf1b08e1dfbcdcd7d3.webp)
# About

**Mobs & Stuff** is an accurate Java Edition recreation of the original [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) Mob textures, bringing the stylized Bedrock aesthetic to all living creatures in your world. Every mob has been carefully retextured to match the unique look and charm of the [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) style.
## Features

- Accurate recreation of the original mob textures found in [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795).
- Enhances both **hostile and passive mobs** with stylized detail and personality.
- Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.3+**.

## Installation

1. Get the most recent version compatible with your Minecraft 1.21.3+ installation.
2. Put it inside your resource pack folder and enable it ingame.
3. When you are combining with [**Items & Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/project/cGI19PB3) or [**Blocks & Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/project/dDqnL6Kd), simply stack the packs using any order.

##  Support & Feedback

Need ideas or have compatibility issues? Let me know, Contact me via my discord account: noahain, feedback enhances support and future showings!

##

## Disclaimer

All textures featured in this resource pack are **fan-made recreations** based on the visual style of the original [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) pack by **Oreville Studios**.  
This project is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Mojang, Microsoft, or Oreville Studios** in any way.  
All recreated assets were designed from scratch to replicate the **style and feel** of the original Bedrock Edition content for **Java Edition** players.
